# userActivityType

**Type Property**

A constant that identifies the launch activity for data import requests.

## Declaration

```swift
class let userActivityType: String
```

## Discussion

The system launches your browser app with this activity when someone initiates a data import request ([doc://BrowserKit/documentation/BrowserKit/BEBrowserDataImportManager/requestImport(for:completionHandler:)]) from your browser.

First, the system launches the source browser with the [doc://BrowserKit/documentation/BrowserKit/BEBrowserDataExportManager] class’s [doc://BrowserKit/documentation/BrowserKit/BEBrowserDataExportManager/userActivityType-4ar5j] to retrieve the data, then the system launches your app with this activity to import the retrieved data.



For more information, see [doc://BrowserKit/documentation/BrowserKit/transferring-browsing-data-to-another-browser].

## Managing import tokens

- **importTokenUserInfoKey**: A key for accessing the data transfer token in the import launch activity’s info dictionary.
- **importTokenUserInfoKey**: A key for accessing the data transfer token in the import launch activity’s info dictionary.
- **userActivityType**: A constant that identifies the launch activity for data import requests.
